extract: Ultra Space (Japanese: ウルトラスペース Ultra Space) is an interdimensional realm from where the Light trio may come, being accessible via Ultra Wormholes. It is connected to many other worlds such as the Pokémon world and the Ultra Beasts' homeworlds. Ultra Space and Ultra Wormholes were discovered and named by Professor Mohn of the Aether Foundation and are currently being researched by Professor Burnet.
